differentials.name: Simple meningocele =  herniation of CSF-filled sac without neural elements
differentials.raw: Simple meningocele =  herniation of CSF-filled sac without neural elements

differentials.name: Myelocele =  midline plaque of neural tissue lying exposed at the skin surface
differentials.raw: Myelocele =  midline plaque of neural tissue lying exposed at the skin surface

differentials.name: Myelomeningocele =  a myelocele elevated above skin surface by expansion of subarachnoid space ventral to neural plaque
differentials.raw: Myelomeningocele =  a myelocele elevated above skin surface by expansion of subarachnoid space ventral to neural plaque

differentials.name: Myeloschisis =  surface presentation of neural elements completely uncovered by meninges
differentials.raw: Myeloschisis =  surface presentation of neural elements completely uncovered by meninges
